reviews.author: Virtanti Darmawan
reviews.text: The restaurant is nice... The food also nice, yummy, delicious ... The owner sooo nice ❤️❤️

reviews.author: Katy Em
reviews.text: Just tried this place today & my spouse and I loved it! We tried the CalMex roll & the hot cheeto roll! Both were soo great, i recommend trying the hot cheeto roll it was great! We will definitely be returning to try more🙌🏼

reviews.author: Sterling Davis
reviews.text: Worth the stop! Hidden gem for sure.

reviews.author: Aaron Griffith
reviews.text: The sushi is very fresh and so good!  The owners and staff are friendly and helpful. Try the Jalapeño Bombs. 10 outa 10. The mochi ice cream is also excellent!

reviews.author: Shandra Brown
reviews.text:
The cook was phenomenal. The rolls were fresh with unique flavors. The forbidden was a top favorite! It surprised me with apple and fried banana. But it was delicious. Also loved firefly.
We were skeptical when entering the small dining area that looks so casual for a sushi restaurant, but the service and food is high quality!!

reviews.author: Sylvia Connolly
reviews.text: I very rarely do any reviews but this one is important to to note of. Been searching for a while for a great Japanese restaurant and happy to say I found this one! Hikari Sushi is outstanding. Hands down the best in SLC. Authentic, fresh and delicious. I highly recommend them to everyone. Cheerful service too! I had the salmon bento, tempura shrimp & vegetables, edamame and miso soup. Next time, I have my eyes and stomach set on the sushi rolls! Lots to choose from and cannot wait.

reviews.author: Julien Lopez
reviews.text: Best sushi in salt lake county! Freddy makes the experience the best. And also makes the best sushi!

reviews.author: Aaron Asch
reviews.text: Very good sushi! Well made, delicious flavor, and fast service. It was a wonderful lunch spot and I will definitely be back!

reviews.author: irelyn Blackwell
reviews.text: Sushi was so good!! Service was great, very friendly! The hot Cheetos roll was a personal favorite of mine.

reviews.author: Jocelyn Evers
reviews.text: The jalapeño bomb was so good, we had to get two orders! Highly recommend.

reviews.author: Matt Atkinson
reviews.text:
We enjoyed 2 orders of Jalepeno Bombs, Playboy, Firefly Fusion & the Forbidden Role.

You got to check out this place...

reviews.author: M. C.
reviews.text: So glad my wife found this place in South Jordan. Best sushi I’ve had in a while. The staff was professional and friendly.

reviews.author: Landon Yergensen
reviews.text: Absolutely AMAZING sushi! I am very new to sushi and they made sure I felt welcome and included. They gave me a rundown on the best options, and even the more adventurous options were absolutely DELICIOUS! Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Lizzy Schmitt
reviews.text: Last minute decided to bring a party of 6 with two kids. They were fantastic, offered great service and have amazing food. Everything we tried was so good. This place needs to be a lot busier than it is.

reviews.author: Lacey Clegg
reviews.text: Great sushi, great service, great prices

reviews.author: Mary Bryan
reviews.text: Excellent!! First time coming here. Unique and delicious rolls! Nice atmosphere and great service.☺️

reviews.author: Heather Sholtis
reviews.text: Super friendly owners who take pride in their service and quality food! Some of the best sushi in the area. They go out of their way to take care of their guests. Special touches like lemon and mint in their water carafe makes this a great date night spot!

reviews.author: Eric Sholtis
reviews.text: Excellent food and friendly service!! Very fresh and very tasty!! Great place for a quiet and peaceful meal with friends and family.

reviews.author: Dayna Stevenson
reviews.text:
This is our new favorite sushi place. I can't believe we were the only customers there -- I guess it's because the location can't be seen from the street. The ingredients were fresh and high-quality, the dishes/rolls were excellent. The owners were kind and personable and the atmosphere was clean and beautiful.

We got the sushi nachos (crab and complementary ingredients on a wonton chip), the cowboy roll (with excellent wagyu), the calimex roll (which even my husband loved despite normally disliking cilantro), and mochi. We enjoyed everything and plan to go back.

reviews.author: Ena Rojo
reviews.text: The sushi was delicious and fresh, they went above and beyond to accommodate our allergy concerns.  My kiddos are picky eaters when it comes to sushi and they absolutely loved their rolls… yes they ordered more than one lol.  We will definitely be back soon.  Thanks for the great experience 🩷

reviews.author: Jordan Brock
reviews.text: The sushi was so good and comes in all flavor profiles. Don’t skip dessert either!

reviews.author: David Coronel
reviews.text: Our first time here, hands down to Freddy!!!! He is very creative and talented!!! Best sushi I've tried in the southwest salt lake area!!!!

reviews.author: Dey Wraps
reviews.text: Great service, great food

reviews.author: yodudehunter
reviews.text: Best sushi Ive had in awhile. their tempura fired rolls amazing, their sushi nachos are amazing! And they even have an interesting one called Cali mex that has cilantro only a few of there items have cilantro on it but that's my only complaint otherwise great place friendly people and would love to shop there at least for a weekly treat

reviews.author: Kendall Heaps
reviews.text: Just went to Hikari Sushi for the first time at the suggestion of our daughter and her husband. This is our new favorite place to get Sushi. Clean, clean, clean. Sushi is wonderful, fresh, and presented beautifully. Great friendly service. Great atmosphere. The place is bright and clean. Even the restroom is spotless. We highly recommend

reviews.author: Brandon Smith
reviews.text: Alaskan rolls were really good. Wait wasn’t very long which is nice. Everyone was friendly!

reviews.author: Megan Clayton
reviews.text: Pretty and quiet setting for really good sushi

reviews.author: Roger Mason
reviews.text: Rarely post but my wife and I have really enjoyed sushi here. Some of the best in the valley, but with very reasonable prices.

reviews.author: Paige Swensen
reviews.text: AMAZING. Oh my gosh. 10,000 stars. Freddie is so kind. Started out with fresh lemon and mint water and complementary edamame. We came at lunch and got the lunch special, which was such an amazing deal! We got the firefly roll, the mango citrus roll, the avocado king roll, and the Playboy roll! We ate every last piece! The owner is so kind, the place is clean, I’ve never actually been to a sushi place where there have been metal chopsticks! This was the best experience I’ve ever had and I will be back. Even the flowers were fresh! Can’t say enough good things about it.

reviews.author: haley sween
reviews.text: I grabbed takeout, and it was beautiful and tasted great!

reviews.author: Megan Garces
reviews.text: Sushi and gyoza was fantastic! Loved the vibe and the food, haven’t had good sushi like this in a minute

reviews.author: Nick Scoresby
reviews.text: The atmosphere is cozy and well decorated. The sushi was excellently made. Perfectly balanced flavors, fairly priced and beautifully presented. Would give it 100 stars if I could!

reviews.author: Josh Smith
reviews.text: The wifey and I randomly came across this place, and we loved it. The attention to detail on the service, food, and ambience were on point. A couple of our favorites were the sushi nachos, Cali Mex roll, Playboy roll, and Avocado King roll. We can’t wait to come back!

reviews.author: J Roberts
reviews.text: Excellent food, service and atmosphere. Very clean with fresh flowers at each table. Freddy is awesome and the sushi was fantastic. We will definitely return.

reviews.author: Sam Sorenson
reviews.text: We came on valentines and it was amazing! Short wait and instant service!  The food was amazing and the staff was attentive/polite!

reviews.author: Christi Grant
reviews.text: Delicious! Nachos were tasty!

reviews.author: Cindy Paulson
reviews.text: We really enjoy coming to this little place.  It’s doesn’t have a lot of atmosphere but the people are very friendly and the food is excellent!

reviews.author: Sheena Clements
reviews.text: Everything about this place is spectacular!! Beauitful food and atmosphere as well as attentive service. Can not wait to eat here again!! New favorite place❤️

reviews.author: Jack Deere
reviews.text: Amazing freaking food!!! So good and the service was amazing everyone was so kind and sweet. They gave us free edamame and pot stickers for a long wait time which wasn’t bad at all. Wonderful food and service and i’m definitely coming back! Better than a lot of mainstream sushi in utah for sure. Please take a visit if you’re a sushi enthusiast.

reviews.author: Wendy Benson
reviews.text:
This place is a hidden GEM ! Staff/ owner was super nice & so sweet with my special needs daughter. The food was gourmet grade YUMMMMY! I REALLY loved the sushi nachos. Definitely unique & so tasty!
It was a little tricky to find- but if you remember it's behind the Guitar Store in South Jordan on the west side of Redwood Road. We are sushi connoisseurs - GO give this place try.
We will be back soon!
-Wendy & Hannah B.

reviews.author: Gracie Allred
reviews.text: SOOOO amazing!! They blew all my expectations out of the water. Everyone was kind and amazing! My favorite dishes were the hot cheeto roll & the sushi nachos. Also the desserts are so amazing as well! I recommend this place 100 percent!

reviews.author: Ali Flames
reviews.text:
(Translated by Google) Excellent service, super clean place. Very pleasant atmosphere. The food was delicious and the flavor was excellent.

(Original)
Excelente  la atención  lugar super limpio . Hambiente  muy agradable . La comida  muy rica y el sabor Exente .

reviews.author: Corey Jensen
reviews.text: Food and staff was amazing. Especially liked the firefly roll. Will definitely be back

reviews.author: Veronica Madrid
reviews.text: Sushi is amazing! Rivals many top rated restaurants. Service is even better! Friendly and welcoming! I can’t say enough about this place!

reviews.author: Dayna Nichols
reviews.text: Absolutely amazing! The quality, presentation, freshness and tase of the food was exemplary!

reviews.author: Paul Kunzler
reviews.text:
My son and I were nearby and stopped in for a bite... only to be utterly blown away by 2 of the best sushi rolls I have ever had in 27 years as a sushi lover!!!  This chef really knows his craft! The flavor combinations and textures were balanced, complimentary, and the kind that make the eaters very quiet as they process the amazing flavor and sensory information that has stolen their attention.

First, the Firefly roll. Chef recommended it, and so do I! That is my #1 favorite roll of all time now! (We ordered another and skipped dessert!)  A real treat and a work of culinary masterpiece and art.

Second, the Cowboy roll.  This one is topped with wagyu beef. I've had some other beef rolls before which were really good. But this one is top of the class there!  Incredible flavor that didn't drown out the rich beef flavor of the tender wagyu, but complimented and enriched it.

We also tried the sushi nachos and I was also surprised at how delicious it looked and tasted.

reviews.author: Teena Forester
reviews.text: I've been to Hikari Sushi a few times now. The staff is kind and attentive. The sushi is delicious.They have quickly become our favorite  sushi spot. The location is great, just across the parking lot from Apollo burger off of 10600 s. and Redwood Road.

reviews.author: Juliet Huynh
reviews.text: So good ! They have a great variety of delicious sushi! My family’s absolute favorites are the ones combined with fruits like strawberry, mango, and avocado. The prices are very affordable and reasonably cheap. We love it here—the service is excellent! We’ll definitely be back! 😉

reviews.author: suele lu
reviews.text: Love the food here , nice looking, good customer service, my family enjoy the meal so much

reviews.author: Ve Ngo
reviews.text: Good food

reviews.author: that guy
reviews.text: This place is awesome the owners are always there and they make you feel super welcome. The food is delicious. Thanks Freddy!!!

reviews.author: Trent Christensen
reviews.text: The food is creative and delicious! Great, friendly staff.

reviews.author: Jessica Cécile
reviews.text: Super clean and friendly staff! Very tasty food! Tried the bowl and jalapeño bombs! Fresh fish, and filtered water! Very Important things to me;) I will definitely come back!

reviews.author: Tameren McMullen
reviews.text: The sushi was great and the selection was unique. Will come again to try out more flavors.

reviews.author: Lisa Jensen
reviews.text: We happened upon this restaurant by a Google search and were so pleasantly surprised we cannot wait to go back and try more! The owner greeted us and instantly made us feel welcome and valued. The sushi rolls were outstanding! Each had very distinct flavors and textures and were even a feast for the eyes. The atmosphere is basic and quaint and lets the food take center stage.

reviews.author: Keanne Murray
reviews.text:
Freddy and his team were so kind! Very friendly staff and I loved the quaint space. Great vibes with the lofi music and easy to talk

The sushi itself was yummy. I really enjoyed the Hikari Delight, Playboy, and the miso soup!

We will definitely be back.

reviews.author: Jessica Farnworth
reviews.text: Very quiet environment and great folds that work here. The food was great! We will come again.

reviews.author: Colton Goodrich
reviews.text: Amazing fresh yummy food just sitting room is a little small and quaint with the service was excellent. Come give this place a try you’ll love it.

reviews.author: jason
reviews.text: It was delicious, reasonably priced, and most importantly, very hygienic.

reviews.author: Erin Christensen
reviews.text: We had a delicious dinner last night with some creative rolls that I never experience at any other sushi restaurant and I’ve been to many. We followed Freddy from his previous employment because we know he will always have something fun AND delicious. He mixes unexpected ingredients and nails it every time. The menu is always changing so there’s something new every time you go in.  I’m already planning another visit because there are some other rolls I want to try but I was way too full.

reviews.author: Brent Christensen
reviews.text: Freddy is a master!!! We love his ever-creative menu.  Always delicious!!!

reviews.author: Clarissa Brandley
reviews.text:
Found my new favorite sushi place! My husband and I had tried several other places in town and nothing really stood out, until now :) We has the hot cheeto sushi, jalapeno bombs, and the vegas roll. All 10/10. Plus the owner was very kind ❤

I highly reccomend you post your store on Doordash! I think it would be nice to find new customers!

reviews.author: Amber Bingham
reviews.text: Best sushi we've had in a long time! And the owners were so kind! We got 5 rolls that were all unique and delicious. Can't wait to go back and try more!!

reviews.author: N S
reviews.text:
The food and service were both quite lovely! If I could give the atmosphere a 3.5, I would. It's cute and cozy, a little less intimate than some other places.

The highlights are both the food and service. You can tell that the owner/chef really cares about food and what he produces. The food was delicate and light, and I mean that in the best way possible. The Citrus Mango Dream and Diamond are pictured here, along with a miso soup. For me, the Diamond was a standout, and I could easily see myself eating similar rolls multiple nights each week. Great job overall; I will be coming again!

reviews.author: Adam Thomas
reviews.text: This place was so good! Fresh ingredients and just so yummy! The poke bowl was amazing and tempura sushi was perfectly done. We will be back!

reviews.author: Cara Alford
reviews.text: The sushi was DELICIOUS! Small location tucked behind Astro Burgers, could be hard to find due to that but so worth the find. We will definitely be back. The owner was very nice and you can tell is very experienced.

reviews.author: Z S
reviews.text: New place and you can tell they are just getting started.  Food and service are excellent.  I had 3 rolls and all were excellent.  Go try this place if you are looking for a new sushi spot.

reviews.author: Debra Howick
reviews.text: The sushi is delicious and beautiful presentation. The staff is very attentive and friendly.  I highly recommend this sushi restaurant.

reviews.author: Amanda H
reviews.text: This was a fantastic quiet little lunch spot!

reviews.author: C Bltrn
reviews.text: This sushi spot deserves all the stars! The place was incredibly clean, which I always appreciate, and the owners were absolutely wonderful and attentive, so welcoming and genuine. And the food… amazing!! Every roll was fresh, flavorful, and beautifully made. Truly a gem. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Keenan B
reviews.text: Very good sushi! Great service. They have traditional options and also some interesting ones. Also chicken bento for non fish eaters.

reviews.author: JLila
reviews.text: Everything is so good and the quality amazing! Haven’t had sushi this good in awhile

reviews.author: R R
reviews.text: We went in for lunch and they had a great lunch special going. Their customer service was great and so was the food!

reviews.author: Michelle Lewis
reviews.text: Everything was delicious! They are a new business. Please support them!

reviews.author: Mindy Hoang
reviews.text: Loved trying this new sushi place! I was honestly very impressed and it exceeded my expectations by far. Food is fantastic, reasonable prices, and all the staff is so kind. This is definitely my new go-to sushi place!

reviews.author: Bryan Croce
reviews.text: Incredibly fresh fish, the owner really puts his passion into the food and ingredients. Some of the best sushi I’ve had in Utah and with reasonable pricing.

reviews.author: Hirina luquez
reviews.text: It's the best sushi place in all of Utah. Its flavors and service make it unique. It's a small but cozy place. I assure you that you'll be happy eating there!

reviews.author: Lexi Skinner
reviews.text: Everything was perfect and melted in your mouth!! So good!!

reviews.author: Mikey L
reviews.text: I had the chirashi bowl and Miso soup and it was amazing. Service was quick and the staff is the owners so the attention to detail is never missed. Going back !

reviews.author: Jacob Hansen
reviews.text: Small little sushi place, not the fanciest, but the food is great! And not too expensive. Vibes are a great place to get food, but not for a date.

reviews.author: Remington Wickham
reviews.text: An amazing experience with prompt, and kind service. Everything was incredible and I’m looking forward to coming back!

reviews.author: Michele Vanthof
reviews.text: Delicious food...We enjoyed our dinner. Thank you so much!

reviews.author: Haileygirl o-o
reviews.text: Came here for my 19th birthday!! The place is so cute and very calm and quiet. The music is very good and the decorations and dishes are all very cute!! The sushi and appetizers were SOO good. They weren't too big or filling so it's great if you want to try a lot and share with others. The staff was also very very nice and gave us an extra free dish (without even knowing it was my birthday) I would highly recommend going it was a great experience and very yummy!!

reviews.author: scott clawson
reviews.text: Great sushi and bento boxes. Nachos were great too

reviews.author: Amy Clawson
reviews.text: We love sushi as a family and we all agreed that this is our new favorite place! The food was fresh and delicious and the service was amazing!

reviews.author: Jonald Gonzalez
reviews.text: This is a really good place to eat. I had the Nacho Sushi and the Cheetos Sushi. Both were delicious, but the Nacho Sushi was better. I am definitely coming back to this place. Freddie the server provided top-notch service. He was friendly and respectful.

reviews.author: JustAndrewThings
reviews.text: This little sushi shop is a must visit for anyone who wants to have a wonderful dinner. Their tasty apetizers range from tempura veggies to sushi nachos. All of their sushu rolls are meticulously made and never disappoint. My wife and I have tried 8 different rolls between the two of us and not a single one has missed.  You can tell that the owner Freddy puts a lot of love into this place. Our only complaint is we were the only people in the restaurant and its lonely:(

reviews.author: Amara Arnold
reviews.text: This adorable little sushi place will be our new go to. We tried 4 different rolls and they were all delicious but we especially loved the citrus roll with mango sauce. The prices are reasonable and the owner is super nice. The miso soup was also particularly good. All the rolls are so unique and fresh tasting. They have some really intriguing lunch specials we'll have to come back for. The serve water with mint and lemon and all the plates and dishes are so cute! The tempura breading is also very light on the fried roll we got.

reviews.author: Alexander Schmidt
reviews.text: My wife, daughter and myself stumbled upon this restaurant and were very impressed with the quality of the food and service. The restaurant itself is very modest inside but the food and service are excellent. Not an extensive menu but they have a nice selection and it is all delicious!

reviews.author: Naomi Bradford
reviews.text: I don’t write reviews often, but this sushi place deserves it!!!!!! I’ve had a ton of sushi at a lot of different places and this one is honestly my favorite so far. the sushi roll options are so fun, but they still have the classics. we got the jalapeño appetizer and it was so fresh and unique. believe it or not, i got the hot cheeto sushi roll and it was SOO GOOD. The store is so cute, the dishes they use are beautiful, vibes are up even though we were the only ones there during midweek lunchtime. our server was so kind and attentive. you can tell the sushi is made well and is fresh. definitely will be coming here again!! and note worthy: i didn’t get asked to write this review, i legit have been thinking about how good this place was all day and just decided to write this review myself!!

reviews.author: Rye
reviews.text: Very good local sushi. Try the hot Cheeto roll. It's amazing.

reviews.author: John Wayne
reviews.text: First time we've tried it, but they were super nice and the food was excellent. Prices were reasonable.

reviews.author: Heather Gayler
reviews.text: Amazing fresh made to order. I can’t say enough about the sushi.

reviews.author: Katie Steck
reviews.text: Wonderful little sushi place with fresh sushi, beautiful presentation, and the owner was so kind and friendly. This is a great hidden gem!

reviews.author: Whitney Fehr
reviews.text: This place was fantastic. The sushi was fresh and delicious and the service was great! Will definitely come back!

reviews.author: Nick Chatelain
reviews.text: Wonderful! Very fresh ingredients.

reviews.author: Matt Brown
reviews.text: Excellent sushi and fantastic service. I think our server was the owner, and he made very sure we were taken care of. 10/5. The place is tiny and clean. Not busy at all at 5 on a Wednesday.

reviews.author: Miranda Salisbury
reviews.text: Such a peaceful ambiance. While eating I was able to enjoy my meal. The server always made sure we had what we needed! Very nice workers, and a clean space.

reviews.author: Jacket Knudsen
reviews.text: REALLY good food, genuinely a hidden gem. One hundred percent recommend. Service is amazing. Environment is great

reviews.author: Stacy L Davies
reviews.text: Delicious food. Great atmosphere and terrific service.

reviews.author: Henry Hemphill
reviews.text: Loved the relaxed atmosphere positive environment and astronomical sushi and service 👌

reviews.author: bri parkin
reviews.text: this is a very small restaurant, but they have unique rolls and the service is good! the owner made our rolls and checked in on us himself. i felt like the prices were good too. this small, locally owned spot is worth your time and money! i loved the kpop tuna roll

reviews.author: Alex Weed
reviews.text: The workers were so kind, and friendly. The food was top notch, and everything was clean and nice. And it was a good deal all things considered. I'll definitely be back here !

reviews.author: Kylee Landon
reviews.text: Seriously, I had one of the best sushi rolls I’ve ever had in my life. We also brought our kids with us and the whole experience was stellar. I don’t know why this place isn’t PACKED every night!

reviews.author: Jessica Rosales
reviews.text: Hikari Sushi restaurant is by far the best sushi restaurant I’ve been in a while. The food is so fresh and the atmosphere is very welcoming. I personally love the Sashimi Rolls, can’t find anything more fresher than here! Also, the premium rolls are delicious! You cannot leave here without trying it. I would recommend this place.

reviews.author: Manuel Gallardo
reviews.text: Beautiful presentation, great service, good vibes 😎.

reviews.author: Ameerah Wishahy
reviews.text: Attentive staff and beautiful presentation of the food. The Mount Fuji roll with albacore tuna was so fresh tasting, I was genuinely impressed. And the chef came to greet us and ask how everything was which was a nice touch.

reviews.author: Jaslyn Stevens
reviews.text: The food was refreshing, beautifully presented, and yummy. The environment was clean and peaceful.

reviews.author: Quinn Jensen
reviews.text: Playboy, Solar Flare & illuminated tuna. Service was outstanding.  A must come back!

reviews.author: Simaima Niutupuivaha
reviews.text: Definitely recommend! Very friendly and nice  staff with clean place… sushi was delicious. Check it out!

reviews.author: Lizzie May
reviews.text: Freddie the chef is top tier, the food is delicious, the servers are very nice and do an amazing job. Loved it here good vibe!

reviews.author: Cameron Corfield
reviews.text: This sushi restaurant was beautiful. It was a very great atmosphere and the servers were very kind and polite. The food was very tasty and had a very good taste to it and it was beautiful. We definitely recommend this sushi restaurant. This is why I gave five star go Broncos.

reviews.author: John Gailey
reviews.text: Absolutely phenomenal food! For the sushi, the firefly fusion is the stand out choice, the flavor was unique and delicious. The jalapeño bombs are also an amazing appetizer. Very welcoming and comfortable shop to eat in.  Definitely coming back to try more sushi and their bento boxes!

reviews.author: Kristal Falepapalangi
reviews.text: Fresh food, well prepared, decent portions, and warm service.

reviews.author: Renae
reviews.text: Food was fresh, unique new sushi rolls. Highly recommend!! Owner was so kind and took pride in his food.

reviews.author: Kirk Harpole
reviews.text: Very good, quality place.  Staff was friendly and atmosphere was nice. Sushi was great quality.

reviews.author: Rachel Willy
reviews.text: Service was great! The food was fresh and delicious. Restaurant was very clean and there were flowers on each table - would dine again!

reviews.author: Rac L
reviews.text: I normally don't give reviews but this place blew me and my husband away! We started with the sushi nachos and the jalepeno bomb. They were the perfect size plates where it's not overload for our main.  We then had the illuminated, the Japanese garden and the Hakiri rolls. Even the water was delicious. I enjoyed every detail that went into putting this restaurant together.

reviews.author: chris Pina
reviews.text: Amazing…got the playboy, emerald, crunch and mexi. Everyone hit just right!

reviews.author: Megan Perkins
reviews.text: The service was excellent and the food was even better. The salmon was cooked perfectly and the sushi was amazing.

reviews.author: Hannah Nguyen
reviews.text: Incredible food and service. Our new go-to spot. We love the Poke Bowl, Illuminated Fire, Jalapeño Bomb, and a chef special roll they made based off of what we like.

reviews.author: mini hawaiian girl
reviews.text: Another Mom & Pop restaurant and I was surprised how delicious their sushi was.  They have a basic list and the premium which is worth the extra money.  On that premium list you can find play boy and there unique roll such as garden & spicy Cheetos.  Now I don’t care for spicy Cheetos but this was very tasty.  Service was friendly and efficient.  Our son told us about them the night before when they visited.  So we decided to tried it.  We ordered asian salad, miso soup and four rolls. We ate every bit of it.  Don’t be shy just try it they had rolls I never heard of.  We tried two of which were delicious. We almost didn’t try this restaurant but you should.  Like I said there is something for everyone.  Try this restaurant it’s worth your time.

reviews.author: Anna Woodruff
reviews.text: PLEASE GO HERE! I went to Hikari Sushi with my son today, we like to try new sushi places, and we both really loved it. The service was very good, they were so nice and very pleasant. The wait was quick. There are a great variety of choices in rolls, but not too overwhelming. We ordered jalapeño bombs as an appetizer and my son said, "I don't care how the other things we ordered taste, these are the best thing here!" I could tell they pay attention to every little detail here, from the fresh flowers on the table and a clean restaurant, to the beautiful plating of the rolls. I also had the salad and it was perfect! Every roll we had was so delicious and like an explosion of flavor. Please go and try this place. The businesses in this spot seem to come and go because it's a little hidden behind Astro Burger, so go try it and tell everyone else you know to try it. We can't have enough great sushi places in our neighborhood. 😊

reviews.author: William Woodruff
reviews.text:
The food was amazing, especially the jalapeño bombs and the salmon delight
Food came out quickly, and had nice plating. The service was very prompt and attentive

reviews.author: Vale Rendon
reviews.text:
(Translated by Google) This place is amazing; the food and service are great.

I highly recommend the appetizers—they're a fantastic start!

This place is wonderful; the food and service are great.
I highly recommend the appetizers—they're a fantastic start!

(Original)
This place is amazing, food and service are great.
I highly recommend the appetizers, those are a fantastic start!

Este lugar es maravilloso, la comida y el servicio son grandiosos.
Altamente recomiendo los appetizers, son un fantastico comienzo.

reviews.author: Scott Southard
reviews.text: Great food, great service and even better staff! Family owned and operated restaurant that serves up some outstanding sushi. Our go to spot for sushi in South Jordan. Check out the sushi nachos, a must try!

reviews.author: Katie
reviews.text: Very clean and friendly.

reviews.author: John Landon
reviews.text: Very friendly owners and great selection of menu items. Sushi was FANTASTIC! We definitely found our sushi spot here in South Jordan.

reviews.author: Samantha Harrison
reviews.text: freddy is an amazing chef, he brings an awesome energy to the place. the food is every bit as good as he is. super fresh super great!

reviews.author: Aaron Allsop-Hofmeister
reviews.text: Hikari Sushi offers an intimate Lo-Fi sushi restaurant experience. There’s charm to its small size,  their mint and lemon water, and their delicious rolls. If you want an affordable sushi date or want to experience a wonderful small restaurant in South Jordan, PLEASE come here. My husband and I will be coming back.

reviews.author: Cameron Winger
reviews.text: BEST SUSHI PLACE EVER!! Service was good, they value their customers and the quality if their food. I like that I dint feel so overwhelming full when I finished my food. Definitely gonna come again!!!

reviews.author: Amanda Felix
reviews.text: Clean restaurant. Good food. The sushi nachos were tasty. Gyoza was fresh, you could tell it’s made in house, and it was fried to perfection. The roll with the spicy Cheetos on top was my favorite of the ones we tried. Nice and attentive service.

reviews.author: Annette Barney
reviews.text: I’ve eaten at this place three times since it opened. The sushi is delicious. The hot Cheetos roll was a surprise hit with my family (all adults) I also really like the salmon sunrise roll.  You can get real wasabi if you request it with your nigiri.  Support local owners and eat here.  They have a reasonable number of roll options not one of those menus that is so large you can’t even read it all.  Their prices are reasonable for sushi.

reviews.author: Lance Anderson
reviews.text: Soooo! Goood!  Such an easy sushi restaurant to get to and enjoy the great food.  The signature roll I ordered was perfect, miso soup and Asian salad spot in.  Great food and friendly service!

reviews.author: James Harding
reviews.text: Excellent sushi and warm friendly service. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Bria Judd
reviews.text: Cutest restaurant, love the food. I’m a huge fan of eel and it feels like not a lot of restaurants have unagi rolls. This one does and it’s amazing. They also have the friendliest staff! We definitely will be coming back

reviews.author: Kayla
reviews.text: Talk about fresh ! I’m so happy this gem is now in sojo ! The owner takes pride in the quality and you can tell by the taste !

reviews.author: Omar Romero
reviews.text:
I had a great experience at this sushi spot. As soon as we walked in, we were greeted and seated right away — service was super fast and friendly. Our server was attentive without being pushy, and drinks and appetizers came out within minutes.

The sushi itself was fresh and full of flavor. You could tell they use quality ingredients — the salmon and tuna were especially buttery and smooth, and the rolls were tightly made and well-balanced. I also tried a couple of specialty rolls and they did not disappoint.

The overall atmosphere was clean, relaxed, and welcoming. Whether you’re grabbing a quick bite or sitting down for a full meal, it’s a great place to enjoy sushi without feeling rushed. Prices were fair for the quality, and I’ll definitely be back. Highly recommend if you’re a sushi fan!

reviews.author: Madison Tandy
reviews.text: The people were amazing, and the food was great! I'm so glad we had a chance to try it. I recommend trying the hot Cheeto roll; I was definitely surprised!!

reviews.author: David Martin
reviews.text: Delicious. Can’t wait to come back.

reviews.author: Seth Williams
reviews.text: Service was amazing, sushi comes with free miso soup. We got free spring rolls. Sushi was amazing and there are tons of options and it’s very unique. Very clean and nice. Definitely coming here often.

reviews.author: Luke Wyner
reviews.text: W vibes love the place def would come back

reviews.author: Michael D
reviews.text: We were in our way to try a new (to us) sushi place and saw Hikari’s sign out front and swung in. Good rolls and friendly staff.

reviews.author: Sonia Romero
reviews.text: Food was delicious, loved the citrus mango dream. Great vibe…

reviews.author: Kimberly Velazquez
reviews.text: Loved coming here! Great place to eat everything was served so beautiful and elegant. Everything was delicious! Recommend!!!

reviews.author: Carrie Howlett
reviews.text: Everything was so fresh and so delicious! The sushi was presented very beautifully and the Tonkatsu was the best I've had! The atmosphere was very chill which is exactly what I needed after a long day of work.

reviews.author: Sheela Magneson
reviews.text: Everything I ate was SO good. Everything was fresh and made to order. I loved that the sushi didn’t make me feel heavy after. This was the first place where I was able to eat more than just a few pieces! The hot Cheetos and starlight crunch rolls were absolute perfection. The service and atmosphere was beyond fantastic. I will definitely be returning.

reviews.author: Cass Eva
reviews.text: FABULOUS!!! I loved the hikari delight roll, hot Cheetos roll, & sushi nachos!! Can’t wait to try more!! 🥰

reviews.author: Anthony Barney
reviews.text: Brand new sushi place in SoJo! So delicious and innovative. They have all the classics, but several of their own new creations as well. The fish was so fresh and flavorful! Freddy even gave us some REAL ground wasabi root! The difference between "wasabi" and wasabi was like the difference between watching fireworks on TV vs laying right underneath the show in real life! I will come back! With friends!

reviews.author: Wilson Rodriguez
reviews.text:
The quality and flavor of the sushi is superb.
Craving for more. My complements for chef Fredy

reviews.author: Carlos Ramos
reviews.text:
(Translated by Google) Great atmosphere, very clean, the food is spectacular and the best part is the prices

(Original)
Muy buen ambiente, muy limpio, Las comida espectacular y lo major los precios

reviews.author: Sameera Zahid
reviews.text: The food was absolutely amazing. Tried a few different types of roles, shrimp tempura, jalapeño bomb, and more. Everything was delicious. Nice ambiance, clean fresh look. Friendly service. The Sushi chef was kind enough to meet us and ask about our experience and food. I will definitely recommend this place for a good Sushi. Will come back to try other options on the menu as there are many.

reviews.author: Tiffany S
reviews.text: Absolutely incredible sushi! Fresh, flavorful, and beautifully presented every time. You can truly taste the quality and care that goes into every roll. The atmosphere is welcoming, the service is top-notch, and the entire experience is great! Whether you’re a sushi lover or just trying it for the first time, this place is a must-visit.

reviews.author: Meilan Stuy
reviews.text: Amazing sushi, great presentation, and ambience! Will be frequently eating here.

reviews.author: Maria Limb
reviews.text: Great food excellent atmosphere best service
